app.title: Instant 1.0, a backend for AI-coded apps
app.author: stopachka
app.description: Backend system for deploying AI-coded applications
proposed_tests: Deploy a simple AI model, measure inference latency vs InstantDB
Test data processing and storage performance with InstantDB
